{
  "schema": "brainflow.procedural_policy.v1",
  "title": "Windows CLI Arg-Length Risk Reduction",
  "rules": [
    "Prefer writing large prompts/payloads to temp files and pass file paths instead of inline CLI args.",
    "Avoid embedding long JSON in command lines; use @file or stdin when possible.",
    "When invoking tools, keep argument lists minimal and favor short flags.",
    "If a command might exceed Windows 8k/32k limits, split work into smaller steps."
  ],
  "last_updated": 1773194496
}
